scripts.db:init: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { py -3 scripts/init_db.py } else { python scripts/init_db.py }"
scripts.dev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { py -3 backend/api.py } else { python backend/api.py }"
scripts.dev: npm run db:init && start "backend" cmd /k "npm run dev:backend" && npm run dev:frontend
